questions.question: Design a half adder in Verilog HDL. Implement the 2-bit half adder using only AND, OR, and NOT gates. Consider the sum and carry outputs.
questions.hint: Use the following inputs: a, b, sum, carry

questions.question: Design a full adder in Verilog HDL. Implement the 3-bit full adder using only AND, OR, and NOT gates. Consider the sum, carry-in, and carry-out outputs.
questions.hint: Use the following inputs: A, B, Cin, sum, Cout

questions.question: Design a binary subtractor using Verilog HDL. Implement the 2-bit binary subtractor using half adder and subtractor logic. Consider the borrow and difference outputs.
questions.hint: Use the following inputs: A, B, borrow, difference
